previous_findings_resolution.evidence: facade.ts:129 — TOOL_ID_RE.test(toolId) is first guard in handleGetSchema(); invalid → errorContent('TOOL_NOT_FOUND'). TOOL_ID_RE imported from router/index.ts.

IsolatedStdioTransport added in mcp-client.ts. spawn() called with explicit env: only caller-supplied env + PATH (if preservePath). No getDefaultEnvironment() call. HOME/SHELL/USER/LOGNAME/TERM never forwarded.

src/index.ts bootstrap(): fs.mkdirSync(logDir) creates ~/.toolhub/logs/; per-MCP WriteStream opened; onChildStderr callback passed to Supervisor; rotateIfNeeded() enforces 10MB limit; all streams closed in shutdown().
claude-code.ts:1 imports lstatSync; line 105 calls lstatSync(full); line 110 skips isSymbolicLink(); MAX_PLUGIN_WALK_DEPTH=8 guard at line 93.
attachBoundedStderr() in mcp-client.ts: 64KB cap with truncation to 32KB + warning; flushRemainder() on 'end'/'close' events; disposer returned and called on MCPClient.close().
writer.ts: MAX_BATCH_SIZE=500, DEFAULT_MAX_QUEUE=10000, setImmediate continuation in flush(), db.transaction wrapper (insertMany), droppedCount() method.
doRevert() (migrate.ts:188) calls atomicWrite() directly — no unlinkSync() before it. unlinkSync() is only used for manifest cleanup at line 192, guarded by try/catch.

buildMigrated() handles Case 1 (unchanged/idempotent), Case 2 (empty/no-op adds toolhub), Case 3 (replaces existing + sets originalMcps). manifest written to ~/.toolhub/migrated-mcps.json. doRevert() removes manifest.
scheduleRestart() uses only 'nextDelay === null' gate (line 158). No MAX_RESTART_ATTEMPTS reference in supervisor/index.ts.
Default logger info at line 59: process.stderr.write('[toolhub] ' + m + '\n'). Not silent.
init.ts:5 imports SCHEMA_SQL from './schema-sql.js'. No FS lookup, no path probing. schema-sql.ts exists and exports the constant.
stats.ts: MIN_SAMPLES_FOR_PERCENTILE=5. count<5 branch prints '(sample size too small — percentiles approximate)' + count/min/max/avg only. count>=5 prints full p50/p95/p99.

Inner arguments are Zod-validated per-case (GetSchemaParamsSchema, InvokeParamsSchema). Outer req.params dispatcher name (line 82) still uses type assertion '(req.params as { name?: unknown }).name'. Non-string name falls safely to default→TOOL_NOT_FOUND so risk is mitigated, but the outer params are not fully Zod-parsed as specified. Retained as warning.
disposeTokenizer() exported from tokenizer/index.ts:29. Called in bootstrap shutdown() at index.ts:125.

facade.ts: CallEnvelopeSchema (z.object({name:z.string(), arguments:z.record(z.unknown()).optional()})) now safeParse's req.params; INVALID_PARAMS returned on fail. Outer dispatch key is no longer a type assertion.
